mapper.select:
SELECT sp.saving_product_id AS id, sp.kor_co_nm AS korCoName, sp.fin_prdt_nm AS finPrdtName, sp.join_way AS joinWay, sp.mtrt_int AS maturityInterest, sp.spcl_cnd AS specialCondition, sp.join_member AS joinMember, sp.etc_note AS etcNote, sp.max_limit AS maxLimit, fc.company_image AS companyImage, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_favorites uf WHERE uf.saving_product_id = sp.saving_product_id AND uf.user_id = #{userId} ) AS isStarred FROM saving_product sp LEFT JOIN financial_companies fc ON INSTR(sp.kor_co_nm, fc.kor_co_nm) > 0 OR INSTR(fc.kor_co_nm, sp.kor_co_nm) > 0 WHERE sp.saving_product_id IN
#{id}

SELECT sp.saving_product_id AS id, save_trm AS period, intr_rate AS baseRate, intr_rate2 AS maxRate, intr_rate_type_nm AS interestType, rsrv_type_nm AS savingMethod FROM saving_product sp LEFT OUTER JOIN saving_option so ON sp.fin_prdt_cd = so.fin_prdt_cd AND sp.fin_id = so.fin_id WHERE sp.saving_product_id IN
#{id}

SELECT dp.deposit_product_id AS id, dp.kor_co_nm AS korCoName, dp.fin_prdt_nm AS finPrdtName, dp.join_way AS joinWay, dp.mtrt_int AS maturityInterest, dp.spcl_cnd AS specialCondition, dp.join_member AS joinMember, dp.etc_note AS etcNote, dp.max_limit AS maxLimit, fc.company_image AS companyImage, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_favorites uf WHERE uf.deposit_product_id = dp.deposit_product_id AND uf.user_id = #{userId} ) AS isStarred FROM deposit_product dp LEFT JOIN financial_companies fc ON INSTR(dp.kor_co_nm, fc.kor_co_nm) > 0 OR INSTR(fc.kor_co_nm, dp.kor_co_nm) > 0 WHERE dp.deposit_product_id IN
#{id}

SELECT dp.deposit_product_id AS id, save_trm AS period, intr_rate AS baseRate, intr_rate2 AS maxRate, intr_rate_type_nm AS interestType FROM deposit_product dp LEFT OUTER JOIN deposit_option so ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = so.fin_prdt_cd AND dp.fin_id = so.fin_id WHERE dp.deposit_product_id IN
#{id}

SELECT sp.saving_product_id AS id, sp.kor_co_nm AS korCoName, sp.fin_prdt_nm AS finPrdtName, fc.company_image AS image FROM saving_product sp LEFT JOIN financial_companies fc ON INSTR(sp.kor_co_nm, fc.kor_co_nm) > 0 OR INSTR(fc.kor_co_nm, sp.kor_co_nm) > 0

SELECT dp.deposit_product_id AS id, dp.kor_co_nm AS korCoName, dp.fin_prdt_nm AS finPrdtName, fc.company_image AS image FROM deposit_product dp LEFT JOIN financial_companies fc ON INSTR(dp.kor_co_nm, fc.kor_co_nm) > 0 OR INSTR(fc.kor_co_nm, dp.kor_co_nm) > 0
SELECT cp.card_product_id AS id, cp.name AS finPrdtName, cp.issuer AS korCoName, cp.card_image_url AS image FROM card_product cp WHERE is_available = true

SELECT cp.card_product_id AS id, cp.card_image_url AS productImage, cp.name AS finPrdtName, cp.issuer AS korCoName, cp.type AS type, cp.annual_fee AS annualFee, cp.pre_month_money AS preMonthMoney, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_favorites uf WHERE uf.card_product_id = cp.card_product_id AND uf.user_id = #{userId} ) AS isStarred FROM card_product cp WHERE cp.is_available = TRUE AND cp.card_product_id IN
#{id}

SELECT parsed_benefit_id AS parsedBenefitId, card_id2, title, category, benefit_type AS benefitType, value, condition_text AS conditionText, max_benefit_monthly AS maxBenefitMonthly, min_spend_per_transaction AS minSpendPerTransaction, pre_month_money_specific AS preMonthMoneySpecific FROM card_parsed_benefit WHERE card_id2 IN
#{id}
